column1: Sprint Goal: A user earns XP and streaks for their workouts and sees this reflected on a complete dashboard, alongside AI motivational messaging.

column5: As a user, I want to earn XP for completing workouts so that my effort is recognized and tracked.

column4: Build and maintain a workout streak
column5: As a user, I want to build a streak by working out consistently so that I'm motivated to keep coming back.

column4: Level up as I earn XP
column5: As a user, I want my accumulated XP to translate into levels so that I have a sense of long-term progression.
As a user, I want to earn badges for milestones so that I have additional goals to look forward to beyond just XP.
column6: Depends on Completion Tracking (US-07.5.1) and Streaks (US-09.3.1).

column4: See today's workout on my dashboard
column5: As a user, I want to see today's recommended workout on my dashboard so that I can start training without extra navigation.
column6: Depends on Workout Recommendation Engine (EPIC-05) and Completion Tracking (US-07.5.1).

column4: See my XP on my dashboard
column5: As a user, I want to see my XP total and progress on my dashboard so that I feel a sense of accomplishment.

column4: See my streaks on my dashboard
column5: As a user, I want to see my current and longest streaks so that I'm motivated to keep showing up.
As a user, I want to receive motivational messages tied to my real activity so that I feel encouraged rather than nagged by generic content.
column6: Depends on Completion Tracking (EPIC-07) and Adjustable Talkativeness (US-06.4.1).
